name: ESPHome + Arduino + Wokwi
postCreateCommand: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y mosquitto wget curl unzip && pip install --upgrade pip && pip install esphome platformio && curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/arduino/arduino-cli/master/install.sh | sh -s -- -b /usr/local/bin && curl -L https://github.com/wokwi/wokwi-cli/releases/latest/download/wokwi-cli-linuxstatic-x64 -o /usr/local/bin/wokwi-cli && sudo chmod +x /usr/local/bin/wokwi-cli
